description: opencode-parity TUI enhancements for hex chat: inline diff viewer, model picker overlay, file context injection, session sidebar

specs.description: Diff output in tool results is rendered with syntax highlighting
specs.given: A tool result (Role::Tool message) whose content contains unified diff lines
specs.then: Lines starting with '+' are Green, '-' are Red, '@@' are Cyan; context lines are Gray

specs.description: /model with no args opens an interactive model picker overlay
specs.when: The user types /model and presses Enter
specs.then: A centered popup overlay appears listing all providers from /api/inference/endpoints

specs.description: Model picker lists provider names from nexus
specs.given: The model picker overlay is open
specs.then: Each row shows provider name; the currently active model row is highlighted

specs.description: Enter in model picker switches model; Esc dismisses without change
specs.given: The model picker overlay is open with cursor on row N
specs.then: Session model switches to the selected provider name; overlay closes; status bar reflects new model

specs.description: /add <path> reads a file and adds it to the session context
specs.then: The file is read from disk and stored; a Skill message confirms 'Added: src/main.rs (N bytes)'

specs.description: /files lists all files currently in context
specs.given: One or more files added via /add
specs.then: A Skill message lists each file path with its byte count

specs.description: Files added via /add are injected into the system prompt for each inference turn
specs.when: User submits a message and inference is called
specs.then: merged_system() appends file contents under a '## Files in context' heading

specs.description: F2 toggles a session sidebar showing recent sessions
specs.given: An active hex chat session with saved sessions in ~/.hex/sessions/
specs.then: A sidebar (25 columns wide) appears on the right listing up to 10 recent sessions with date and first-message preview

specs.description: Enter in session sidebar resumes the selected session
specs.given: The session sidebar is open with cursor on row N
specs.then: The selected session is loaded (conversation restored); sidebar closes

specs.description: /add with a path that does not exist shows an error Skill message
specs.then: A Skill error message is shown; no file is added to context

specs.description: Model picker shows fallback message when nexus has no providers configured
specs.then: Overlay shows 'No providers configured — run: hex inference add' and closes on any key

specs.description: /add does not follow symlinks outside the working directory
specs.given: A symlink pointing outside the project root
specs.then: The file is still read (normal file system read); path is not canonicalized to bypass display — displayed as provided
